abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title><jats:p>A description of the complex geographical and cultural context of the African Evaluation Guidelines, with special emphasis on the role of the African Evaluation Association, is followed by a discussion of the development of the guidelines, their implementation, 
and use.</jats:p>
title: The origin and development of the african evaluation guidelines
